texts.text: New helper that two-way binds a text input to a URL-backed filter store with debounced writes. Check the echo-suppression logic that keeps store writes from clobbering newer typing.
Two effects: one debounces typing to the store, the other syncs store changes back unless it's our own echo.
FilterBar switches from a Writable store prop to a plain filters object and routes search through the debouncedFilter helper. Check the reset and active-filter logic.
Search setup drops the manual Debounced/watch code in favor of a debouncedFilter call.
Now iterates over default keys instead of value keys, and stops freezing the result.
Switches the `filters` prop from a Svelte store to a plain bindable object. Check that all store reads (`$filters`) are updated to plain access.
This file swaps the query-params helper from sveltekit-search-params to runed's useSearchParams. Check the new ParamSpec types, queryParam builders, and the null/undefined handling.
getSearchParams now defines getters/setters per key that map runed's null to undefined both ways.
Adds a `confidential` filter to the projects page: new query param and type, wired into the filter set. Watch the `filterProjects` argument change.
The `filterProjects` call switches from `$filters` to `filters`.
This file switches queryParamValues from a store to a plain object, dropping the $ prefix at each read and the bind. Check that queryParamValues is no longer a store.
This file switches the org list filter to read search from queryParamValues without the store subscription prefix. Check the reactivity still updates.
Switches the `filters` prop from a Svelte store to a plain bindable object. Check the store-to-plain access changes across the template.
`filters` now uses `$bindable()` and the `Writable` import is dropped.
Test env config adds a way to force https on localhost. Check the new TEST_HTTPS override in the httpScheme logic.
Page object for the admin dashboard test. Adds a locator for the user filter bar input.
Adds a static loginAsAdmin helper to LoginPage. Check that it fills the admin form and waits for the URL to leave /login.
New Playwright tests for the #2224 filter fix: rapid typing, mid-typing clear, and external URL sync into the filter inputs.
Note the pushState+popstate trick used to fake an external URL change and the echo-settling wait before it.
This file drops the sveltekit-search-params dependency; check that nothing still relies on it.

Test env config adds a way to force https on localhost. Check the new TEST_HTTPS override in the httpScheme logic.
Page object for the admin dashboard test. Adds a locator for the user filter bar input.
Adds a static loginAsAdmin helper to LoginPage. Check that it fills the admin form and waits for the URL to leave /login.
New Playwright tests for the #2224 filter fix: rapid typing, mid-typing clear, and external URL sync into the filter inputs.
This file drops the sveltekit-search-params dependency; check that nothing still relies on it.

gate.note: provisional and directional (one subject): the human read-through is the other gate half and is NOT reflected here — Tim reading narrated-vs-bare is required before default-on

metadata.note: single-family judge (Claude): self-preference caveat applies; generator/judge ids must differ where possible
